Generated Narrative: StructureDefinition BeModelDiagnosticReportDiabetes

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
BeModelDiagnosticReportDiabetes 0..*BaseLogical data model for Diabetes Diagnostic Report
identifier 1..*IdentifierUnique identifier of the report
recordedDate 1..1dateTimeDate the report was authored.
status 0..1codeThe status of the report
patient 1..1Reference()The patient - subject of the report.
recorder 1..1Reference()The provider or organization that encodes the information.
performer 1..1Reference()The service provider or organization that collects the observations and produces the report.
interpreter 0..1IdentifierCare provider that interpreted the observations in the report.
observationPeriod 1..1PeriodThe period covered by the report.
category 1..*CodeableConceptCategory of the report.
qualification 1..1CodeableConceptThe determined category of diabetic patient (CAT 1, CAT 2, CAT 3)
device 0..1Reference()The device used in the report
code 1..1CodeableConceptThe type of report code
derivedObservations 0..*ObservationObservations derived from initial data
measurementObservations 0..*ObservationObservations actually captured and used to produce the analysis
diagnosis 0..*ConditionProblem reference related to this diagnostic report????
note 0..*Annotationreport comments in free text format.
document 0..1BinaryPDF document containing the complete report (text, graphics, deduced observations, conclusions, etc.)

Documentation for this format
